main.description: Plan sealed-archive downloads for a historical backfill. The response names whole sealed segments or sealed-segment block ranges that may contain rows matching the requested DID and collection filters, and is paginated: pin sealedTipSeq and page with afterSeq=plannedThroughSeq until plannedThroughSeq reaches it. This is a transport planner only: clients must still decode rows, apply exact filtering, fold deletes/updates, and coordinate live-tail subscription independently. Deletion markers (record-level and DID-level) ride inline in the planned blocks; there is no separate tombstone fetch.

dids.description: Exact DIDs to match. Missing or empty means all DIDs.

collections.description: Collection filters to match. Each entry is either an exact NSID (e.g. app.bsky.feed.post) or a namespace wildcard ending in '.*' (e.g. app.bsky.feed.*), which matches every collection under that namespace prefix. Missing or empty means all collections. A wildcard that matches no archived collection yields an empty plan (it is not treated as match-all).

afterSeq.description: Lower exclusive sequence bound. Rows with seq <= afterSeq are outside the requested window.

beforeSeq.description: Upper inclusive sequence bound. Rows with seq > beforeSeq are outside the requested window.

plannedThroughSeq.description: Continuation cursor: the highest sealed seq this page accounts for. When the page is truncated to fit the server's per-page entry limit it is the MaxSeq of the last included work unit; otherwise it equals sealedTipSeq. Fetch the next page with afterSeq=plannedThroughSeq (exclusive). The whole sealed archive has been consumed once plannedThroughSeq >= sealedTipSeq.

sealedTipSeq.description: Pagination goal: the sealed-archive tip, capped by beforeSeq when provided. Stable across pages of the same archive snapshot; pin it once and page until plannedThroughSeq reaches it.

name.description: Segment filename accepted by getSegment and getBlock.

checksum.description: Segment-format xxh3 metadata checksum as 16-char hex.

mode.description: segment means download the whole segment with getSegment; blocks means download the listed block ranges with getBlock.

blocks.description: Inclusive block ranges. Present only when mode is blocks.

first.description: First block index in this inclusive range.

last.description: Last block index in this inclusive range.

entries.description: Number of response work entries counted against the server plan limit.
